reservation.source_phrase: Tickets purchased online will be valid for the entire 2026 season.
reservation.source_block:
Ticket Options
Explore the different ticketing options below for the Museum's multiple living history sites. Tickets purchased online will be valid for the entire 2026 season.

hours.source_phrase: Open 7 days a week, 9 a.m. - 5 p.m.
hours.source_block:
Visit Plimoth Patuxet Museums
One Museum. Four immersive exhibits. Endless possibilities to discover. Plimoth Patuxet Museums is open for the 2026 Season now through the Sunday following Thanksgiving Day.
Mayflower II will open for the season on Saturday, May 2, at 9:00 a.m.
Hours
Open 7 days a week, 9 a.m. - 5 p.m.
